ns0:entry.ns0:title: ankitects/anki
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ankitects/anki
Language: rust
Anki is a smart spaced repetition flashcard program

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dora-rs/dora
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dora-rs/dora
Language: rust
DORA (Dataflow-Oriented Robotic Architecture) is middleware designed to streamline and simplify the creation of AI-based robotic applications. It offers low latency, composable, and distributed dataflow capabilities. Applications are modeled as directed graphs, also referred to as pipelines.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: emilk/egui
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/emilk/egui
Language: rust
egui: an easy-to-use immediate mode GUI in Rust that runs on both web and native

ns0:entry.ns0:title: farion1231/cc-switch
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/farion1231/cc-switch
Language: rust
A cross-platform desktop All-in-One assistant tool for Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, openclaw & Gemini CLI.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: gitbutlerapp/gitbutler
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gitbutlerapp/gitbutler
Language: rust
The GitButler version control client, backed by Git, powered by Tauri/Rust/Svelte

ns0:entry.ns0:title: iced-rs/iced
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/iced-rs/iced
Language: rust
A cross-platform GUI library for Rust, inspired by Elm

ns0:entry.ns0:title: launchbadge/sqlx
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/launchbadge/sqlx
Language: rust
🧰 The Rust SQL Toolkit. An async, pure Rust SQL crate featuring compile-time checked queries without a DSL. Supports PostgreSQL, MySQL, and SQLite.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: longbridge/gpui-component
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/longbridge/gpui-component
Language: rust
Rust GUI components for building fantastic cross-platform desktop application by using GPUI.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: louis-e/arnis
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/louis-e/arnis
Language: rust
Generate any location from the real world in Minecraft with a high level of detail.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mikeyobrien/ralph-orchestrator
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mikeyobrien/ralph-orchestrator
Language: rust
An improved implementation of the Ralph Wiggum technique for autonomous AI agent orchestration

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nautechsystems/nautilus_trader
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nautechsystems/nautilus_trader
Language: rust
Production-grade Rust-native trading engine with deterministic event-driven architecture

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nearai/ironclaw
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nearai/ironclaw
Language: rust
IronClaw is OpenClaw inspired implementation in Rust focused on privacy and security

ns0:entry.ns0:title: openai/codex
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/openai/codex
Language: rust
Lightweight coding agent that runs in your terminal

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pola-rs/polars
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pola-rs/polars
Language: rust
Extremely fast Query Engine for DataFrames, written in Rust

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pydantic/monty
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pydantic/monty
Language: rust
A minimal, secure Python interpreter written in Rust for use by AI

ns0:entry.ns0:title: rolldown/rolldown
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/rolldown/rolldown
Language: rust
Fast Rust bundler for JavaScript/TypeScript with Rollup-compatible API.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: rustfs/rustfs
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/rustfs/rustfs
Language: rust
🚀2.3x faster than MinIO for 4KB object payloads. RustFS is an open-source, S3-compatible high-performance object storage system supporting migration and coexistence with other S3-compatible platforms such as MinIO and Ceph.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tree-sitter/tree-sitter
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tree-sitter/tree-sitter
Language: rust
An incremental parsing system for programming tools
